mapper.insert:
insert into agent_memory_detail(id, agent_memory_id, step_name, parent_step_id, next_step_id, step_type, branch_condition, branch_route, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.id}, #{entity.agentMemoryId}, #{entity.stepName}, #{entity.parentStepId}, #{entity.nextStepId}, #{entity.stepType}, #{entity.branchCondition}, #{entity.branchRoute}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})
